home.hero_sub: Authentic tickets, VIP access, exclusive experiences. Discreet. Reliable. Direct.
home.featured_subtitle: The best seats, selected for you.
home.step_1_body: Browse our curated selection or submit a bespoke request for an event you can't find elsewhere.
home.step_2_body: Pay with confidence via Stripe. Your card details never touch our servers.
home.step_3_body: Receive your tickets by email before the event, guaranteed authentic.
home.guarantee_4: FR / EN support 7 days a week
home.request_sub: Our bespoke sourcing service finds tickets for any event worldwide.

request.title: Can't find your event?
request.subtitle: Tell us what you're looking for, we'll get back to you within 2h with a quote.
request.success_body: We'll get back to you very soon with a personalised quote.

concerts.meta_desc: Find the best concert tickets with Zenntry. Guaranteed authentic tickets, VIP access, delivered before the event.
concerts.sub: Access to the best seats for your favourite artists. Authentic. Discreet. Delivered before the event.
concerts.seo_body: Zenntry is your premium ticketing service for concerts. We source authentic tickets for the most in-demand events, from world tours to intimate shows.
concerts.seo_list_1: Tickets for all major artists and world tours
concerts.seo_list_2: VIP access, hospitality and exclusive experiences
concerts.seo_list_4: Personalised FR / EN service, 7 days a week
concerts.faq_1_a: Yes, all our tickets are 100% authentic and verified before delivery. We offer a full refund if your tickets are found to be invalid at the door.
concerts.faq_2_q: How will I receive my tickets?
concerts.faq_2_a: Your tickets are sent to you by email (PDF or e-ticket) before the event. In some cases, they may be posted or available at the box office.
concerts.faq_3_q: What if the concert is cancelled?
concerts.faq_3_a: If the organiser cancels the event, you will be fully refunded as quickly as possible. We handle all the necessary steps on your behalf.

sports.sub: Access to the best seats for your favourite sporting events. Authentic. Discreet. Delivered before kick-off.
sports.seo_body: Zenntry is your premium ticketing service for sports events. Football, tennis, rugby, Formula 1 — we source tickets for the most sought-after competitions.
sports.seo_list_1: Football, tennis, rugby, F1 and much more
sports.seo_list_4: Personalised FR / EN service, 7 days a week
